home.title: Reclaim the rhythm of your money.
home.lede: Monétika is a daily financial journal. No banking API, no gimmicks. Your numbers, your fingers, your judgement.

bullets.one: Log an expense in under five seconds.
bullets.two: Allocate your income across six buckets — necessities, emergency, education, investment, joy, giving.
bullets.three: Track your Financial Momentum Note month after month.

signup.title: Let’s open your journal.
signup.lede: A few details will do. We will send a sign-in link to your e-mail.

sent.title: Check your inbox.
sent.body: The sign-in link expires in 15 minutes. If you don’t see it, check spam.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.lede: Magic link by e-mail, or 6-digit PIN if you already set one.

sent.title: Check your inbox.
sent.body: The sign-in link expires in 15 minutes.

verify.waitTitle: Open the link from your e-mail.
verify.waitBody: This page refreshes automatically once the link is confirmed.
verify.expiredBody: Request a new link — sign-in links remain valid for 15 minutes.
verify.invalidBody: The link has been used already or contains an error. Request a new one.

I.title: Who are you?
I.lede: These details stay local to your account. You can change them later.

II.title: Where do you live?
II.lede: Country sets the primary currency and pre-fills institutions when adding accounts.

III.title: Your journal, not a bank.
III.lede: Monétika holds no funds and connects to no bank. It records what you write.

points.one: No PSP or EMI license needed — you keep the journal.
points.two: Your numbers are stored encrypted on Neon, EU/US regions, accessible to you only.
points.three: You may export or delete your data at any moment from Settings.

IV.title: Create a 6-digit code.
IV.lede: This PIN protects access from your phone. Pick digits that aren’t obvious.
IV.alreadySet: A PIN is already set on this account.

V.title: Allocate your income.
V.lede: Recommended: 55% necessities, 15% emergency, 10% education, 10% investment, 5% joy, 5% giving. Total must equal 100.

VI.title: Add your first account.
VI.lede: You can add more later — one per institution.
VI.alreadyCreated: A first account is already created.

VII.title: Your journal is ready.
VII.lede: You can start recording entries right now.
VII.body: Your first account is recorded, your PIN is set, your strategy is adopted. You can now log your first entry.

notFound.title: This page does not exist.
notFound.body: The link you followed may be stale, or the URL is misspelt.

generic.title: Something slipped.
generic.body: We logged the incident. Try again in a moment.

netWorth.multiCurrency: {count, plural, one {# other currency} other {# other currencies}} not counted

list.title: entries
list.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No entries} one {1 entry} other {# entries}}

list.title: accounts
list.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No active accounts} one {1 active account} other {# active accounts}}

create.title: new account
create.subtitle: Add a bank, Mobile Money, securities or cash account.

adjust.body: Realign after checking your real statement.

block.body: Prevents new entries on this account without deleting it.
